case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS GEIKAS, ANNETTE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEIKAS, ANNETTE $716.90 PRINCIPAL, $25.87 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $742.77, DEFT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEIKAS, ANNETTE $1,444.84 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,444.84
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $702.07 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT GEIKAS, ANNETTE
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT GEIKAS, ANNETTE NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-30-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-02-2004 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
